\tzpentry{ID4217}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4217 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\vec{\mu}_1 = -\vec{\mu}_2 = \mu\hat{z}$
\]
